primarySetting: One consistent night bedroom for the whole story: same child bed, same small warm bedside lamp, same blanket, same scattered pillow-cave fort near the bed, optional same window. Contained, safe, warm, readable — NOT dark horror lighting. No location change across pages.

fixedAnchors.label: same night bedroom
fixedAnchors.description: Same child bedroom at night — warm readable lamp glow, not pitch black

fixedAnchors.label: same child bed
fixedAnchors.description: Same bed with blanket every page

fixedAnchors.label: same small warm lamp
fixedAnchors.description: Same small warm bedside lamp — cozy night light, may dim on final page only

fixedAnchors.label: same pillow-cave fort
fixedAnchors.description: Same pillow-cave fort zone near the bed — built on p1, collapsed/scattered p1 onward, never magically rebuilt

fixedAnchors.label: same blanket-fold thunder corner
fixedAnchors.description: Soft fold/corner in the child's blanket by the pillow — emotionally named פינת הרעם. A blanket detail, NOT a magical object, NO lightning symbol, NO glow artifact, NO text

allowedZones.description: Single night bedroom zone. Same bed, blanket, warm lamp, pillow-cave area near bed. Camera may move closer/wider but the room does not redesign.
stableGeometry: same small warm lamp beside bed
pillow-cave fort area on floor or bed edge near pillows
optional same window with soft night outside

forbiddenDrift: written letters or text in scene
transitionRules: No location change — only camera distance/framing varies within the same night bedroom.
Pillow-cave stays scattered after collapse — never magically perfect until a new story day.
פינת הרעם is always a soft blanket fold — never a invented magical corner prop.
isolatedObjectPromptInstruction: Use the ISOLATED OBJECT reference images for OBJECT IDENTITY and SCALE ONLY: pillow-cave fort (built/collapsed states) and/or small warm night lamp. Neutral cream background in refs is NOT the page background. Do NOT copy reference composition. NEVER attach a composed bedroom scene ref. Blanket-fold thunder corner is a blanket detail — NOT a magical object, NO lightning symbol.

visibleAnchors: child calmer but not overly smiling
pagePlans.cameraPositionHint: Cozy night bedroom cover — warmth + emotional promise, title-safe band at top. NO magical thunder corner glow.
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Warm readable night light; promise of safe small place for big feeling
pagePlans.pageAction: Cover: child and Leo in cozy night bedroom beside soft scattered pillow-cave and warm lamp. Leo gentle and soft-maned; child calmer but not overly smiling. Emotional promise = a big feeling gets a small safe place. NO glowing thunder-corner spoiler.
Child sits beside COLLAPSED pillow-cave fort — top pillow fallen, fort just failed. Child holds blanket tightly, frustrated and hurt. Leo NOT present yet.
Small soft-maned Leo cub sits gently on blanket edge; child still holds blanket but turns toward Leo. Cozy warm lamp.

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Mane lifts slightly; mouth NOT wide scary
pagePlans.pageAction: Leo begins tiny almost-roar then stops gently — mane lifts slightly, mouth NOT wide or scary. Child tiny almost-smile. Lamp calm.
Child pulls blanket up to nose trying to hide the feeling — blanket looks heavy, body tense underneath. Leo watches quietly beside, concerned but gentle.
Leo sits low and vulnerable, one paw on blanket; child listens, hands loosen grip. Intimate cozy night room.

visibleAnchors: Leo two paws + child hand on blanket
pagePlans.allowedVariation: Thunder corner named — soft fold only
pagePlans.pageAction: Child finds small blanket FOLD beside pillow — thunder corner. Leo places two paws on blanket; child one hand beside paws. Scattered pillow cave visible. Fold is blanket detail only.

pagePlans.allowedVariation: Very subtle warm softness in fold ONLY — nothing more
pagePlans.pageAction: SMALL INTIMATE: child leans toward blanket fold and releases tiny quiet sound; Leo adds tiny pillow-sized soft near-roar. Both safe and slightly amused. NO text, NO bubbles, NO wide mouth, NO magical beam. Optional: very subtle warm softness in fold only.
Child lies down near Leo, calm and sleepy. Pillow cave still scattered. Blanket-fold thunder corner remains. Lamp dims softly. Warm grounded ending.
